prompt:
Professional placeholder portrait for resume page. Square photo, head and shoulders, centered.

Subject: An Asian male AI infrastructure engineer in his late 20s, calm focused expression, short clean hair, looking slightly off-camera. Wearing a simple dark green or charcoal grey shirt or sweater. Photographic realism, professional headshot quality, natural soft lighting. Background: very simple dark deep-green #0B211D blurred (bokeh), no distracting elements.

Style: Modern professional LinkedIn-style portrait, not corporate-stiff, slightly artistic, warm yet quiet personality. The face should be photoreal but generic enough to serve as a placeholder.

Avoid: cartoonish, anime, oversaturated, neon, beauty filter, plastic skin, fantasy costume, MMORPG character, accessories like glasses, hats, beard, jewelry, tattoos, logos on clothing, dramatic shadows, busy background.
